# OpenFGC Workspace Copilot Instructions

This workspace is a monorepo.

- Use scoped instruction files in `.github/instructions/` for area-specific guidance.
- Respect the nearest `AGENTS.md` for folder-level defaults and conventions.

Scoped instructions currently defined:
- `portal/backend/**` -> `.github/instructions/portal-backend.instructions.md`
- `portal/frontend/**` -> `.github/instructions/portal-frontend.instructions.md`
